name: spotify-top-artists
description: Get the user's top Spotify artists by listening time. Returns artist names, genres, and popularity scores. Use for questions like 'what artists have I been listening to?', 'who are my favorite artists?', 'what genres do I listen to most?', 'what's my music taste?'. time_range controls the window: short_term=last 4 weeks, medium_term=last 6 months, long_term=all time.

input.description: Query parameters: time_range (short_term|medium_term|long_term, default medium_term), limit (1-50, default 20).

output.description: Spotify top artists response with items array. Each artist has name, genres (array), popularity (0-100), followers count, and Spotify ID.
